recommendations.title: Our Times
recommendations.overview: Office worker Truly Lin goes on a journey through her memories. 20 years ago, she had a crush on the most popular guy in school. Taiyu, a ruffian and a bully, is in love with the campus belle. Truly teams up with Taiyu to tear the golden couple apart

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: The Next 365 Days
recommendations.overview: Laura and Massimo's relationship hangs in the balance as they try to overcome trust issues while a tenacious Nacho works to push them apart.

recommendations.title: All of You
recommendations.overview: Laura and Simon have been best friends since college. Over the years, they've realized their bond is more than platonic. Can they—and should they—risk everything to explore a love that has existed all along?

recommendations.title: Nada que ver
recommendations.overview: After Carlos is tasked to care for Paola, both characters must work out their differences to make their time together more pleasant. As time goes on, they are faced with lessons about trust, mutual respect, and perhaps love.

recommendations.title: Our Lovers
recommendations.overview: Carlos is a professionally frustrated screenwriter, and Irene is not sure what she wants to do with her life. When Irene meets Carlos at a coffee shop, she approaches him and, although she doesn't know him, proposes to play a game.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani
recommendations.overview: On a trekking trip, an introverted Naina falls for a charming ex-classmate, whose thirst for adventure drives them apart. Years later, their paths cross again.

recommendations.title: El man del porno
recommendations.overview: When Carlos Andrés decides that the best way to contribute to his family is to become a porn actor, the only problem is that his girlfriend does not know about his successful career.
